About Me

I code. I build.
I ship.

I'm Aditya — a final-year Computer Science student at Lovely Professional University and a Full Stack Developer with real experience shipping production apps.

I currently work at Aaruchudar — a neuroscience & cognitive training company — where I build everything from the marketing website to internal enterprise systems and mobile apps.

Outside of work, Builder @ Musubi Earn Musubi Earn, a performance marketing platform connecting brands with creators in the Indian creator economy. We handle real Instagram & YouTube verification with Razorpay payouts.

When I'm not writing code, you'll find me at the gym — I take training as seriously as I take my projects.

🏢

Web Developer @ Aaruchudar

Jun 2025 – Apr 2026

Built the website, internal management system, and mobile app for a neuroscience company.

🚀

Builder @ Musubi Earn

2025 – Present

Developed a creator economy platform with API-verified campaigns, payout automation, and scalable full stack architecture.

🎓

B.Tech CSE @ LPU

2022 – 2026 · CGPA 7.32

Specializing in web development, distributed systems, and modern software engineering.

📹

DSA Content Creator

Jan – May 2025

Created beginner-friendly educational content on Trees, Graphs, and Dynamic Programming.

Selected Work

Things I've
Built.

From enterprise management systems to AI tools and real-time multiplayer games — here's what I've shipped.

01
Enterprise

Aaruchudar Management System

Enterprise internal platform powering attendance tracking, leave approvals, task management, and employee status monitoring. Architected a secure 5-tier RBAC system with Google OAuth2 + JWT auth and IST-based real-time dashboards.

Next.jsTypeScriptPrisma ORMMongoDBGoogle OAuth2
02
Game

Bingo — Real-Time Multiplayer

Scalable multiplayer gaming platform supporting 100+ concurrent users with low-latency WebSocket communication. Deployed on AWS EC2 with optimized socket performance for smooth real-time gameplay and high uptime.

Next.jsWebSocketAWS EC2Node.js
03
AI Tool

QuickScan AI

AI-powered document analysis platform extracting insights, obligations, and risks from PDFs. Integrated Google Gemini API with drag-and-drop uploads and client-side PDF parsing for faster processing.

Next.jsGemini APIpdfjs-distTypeScript
04
Musubi Earn — Reward Based Platform

Musubi Earn

Two-sided performance marketing platform for the Indian creator economy. Brands run campaigns, creators complete tasks, earn money — verified via Instagram & YouTube APIs. Razorpay-powered instant payouts.

Next.jsTypeScriptRazorpayInstagram APIYouTube API
05
Mobile

Aaruchudar Mobile App

Cross-platform mobile application for Aaruchudar built with React Native & Expo. 4-tab layout covering Home, Programs, Quiz, and About. Deployed via EAS Build with APK distribution for Android.

React NativeExpoEAS BuildTypeScript
06
Web Platform

Social Media Management Platform

Web-based social media management platform for handling content workflows, scheduling, and platform organization. Focused on responsive UI, scalable architecture, and streamlined user experience.

ReactNode.jsMongoDBExpress
07
Machine Learning

E-Commerce Recommendation System

Machine learning powered recommendation engine for e-commerce platforms using user preferences, ratings, and behavioral filtering techniques to improve product discovery.

PythonMachine LearningRecommendation SystemData Analysis
